https://cps-vo.org/group/forces for the active site. FORCES is designed to help protect the nation's critical infrastructure from attack and to ensure its robust, secure and efficient operation. Specifically, FORCES aims to increase

operation. Specifically, FORCES aims to increase the resilience of large-scale networked cyber-physical systems (CPS) in the key areas of energy delivery, transportation, and energy management in buildings. FORCES started on
management in buildings. FORCES started on April 15, 2013, and is scheduled to end on March 31, 2019. See NSF Award Abstract 1239166 . Website Copyright ©
